title: crocanthemum brasiliense
intro: Crocanthemum brasiliense, also known as Brazilian dwarf shrub or Brazilian  silverleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional folk remedies for its perceived medicinal and healing properties.
